message:
Running command: # All 21 log files exist! Let me check them
BUILD_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/sim_build"

for LOG in "$BUILD_DIR"/*.log; do
  SCENARIO=$(basename "$LOG" .log)
  PASS=$(grep -c "PASS: smoke\|SEQ: PASS\|RAND_SYS: done\|XIP_DIRECTED: done" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  FAIL=$(grep -c "FAIL:" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  ERRS=$(grep "errors=" "$LOG" | tail -1 | grep -o "errors=[0-9]*" | head -1)
  
  if [ "$PASS" -gt 0 ] && [ "$FAIL" -eq 0 ]; then
    STATUS="PASS"
  elif [ -n "$ERRS" ] && [ "$ERRS" = "errors=0" ]; then
    STATUS="PASS"
  elif grep -q "FAIL: testbench timeout\|TIMEOUT" "$LOG"; then
    STATUS="TIMEOUT"
  elif [ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ]; then
    STATUS="FAIL"
  else
    STATUS="UNKNOWN"
  fi
  
  printf "  %-50s %s\n" "$SCENARIO" "$STATUS"
done

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# All 21 log files exist! Let me check them
BUILD_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/sim_build"

for LOG in "$BUILD_DIR"/*.log; do
  SCENARIO=$(basename "$LOG" .log)
  PASS=$(grep -c "PASS: smoke\|SEQ: PASS\|RAND_SYS: done\|XIP_DIRECTED: done" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  FAIL=$(grep -c "FAIL:" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  ERRS=$(grep "errors=" "$LOG" | tail -1 | grep -o "errors=[0-9]*" | head -1)
  
  if [ "$PASS" -gt 0 ] && [ "$FAIL" -eq 0 ]; then
    STATUS="PASS"
  elif [ -n "$ERRS" ] && [ "$ERRS" = "errors=0" ]; then
    STATUS="PASS"
  elif grep -q "FAIL: testbench timeout\|TIMEOUT" "$LOG"; then
    STATUS="TIMEOUT"
  elif [ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ]; then
    STATUS="FAIL"
  else
    STATUS="UNKNOWN"
  fi
  
  printf "  %-50s %s\n" "$SCENARIO" "$STATUS"
done
